name: CreateSubscription
description: Create a new recurring payment subscription for a customer. The subscription automatically generates payments at the specified interval (e.g., '1 month', '2 weeks', '1 day'). The customer must have a valid mandate (payment authorization) for recurring charges. You can optionally specify the number of payments (otherwise it runs indefinitely), a start date, and a webhook URL for payment notifications. This endpoint requires the 'subscriptions.write' scope.

customer_id.description: The ID of the customer to create a subscription for (e.g., 'cst_abc123'). The customer must have a valid mandate.

amount_value.description: The amount for each recurring payment (e.g., '10.00'). This will be charged at every interval.

amount_currency.description: The currency of the recurring payment amount (e.g., 'EUR', 'USD'). Must match the customer's mandate currency.

interval.description: Payment interval in format '{count} {period}' where period is 'days', 'weeks', or 'months'. Examples: '1 month' (monthly), '2 weeks' (bi-weekly), '3 months' (quarterly), '1 day' (daily). This determines how frequently payments are created.

description.description: Description that will appear on each recurring payment and on the customer's bank statement. Should clearly identify the subscription purpose.

profile_id.description: The profile ID to associate the subscription with. This is required.

times.description: Optional number of times to charge the customer. If omitted, the subscription continues indefinitely until manually canceled. For example, set to 12 for a year of monthly payments.

start_date.description: Optional start date for the subscription in YYYY-MM-DD format (e.g., '2025-01-15'). If omitted, starts immediately. The first payment is created on this date.

webhook_url.description: Optional webhook URL to receive notifications when subscription payments are created, paid, or fail. Overrides the profile's default webhook.

mandate_id.description: Optional specific mandate ID to use for recurring charges. If omitted, uses the customer's default valid mandate.

testmode.description: Enable test mode. Set to 'true' to create a test mode subscription, or omit for live mode.
